title: Refooled
description: Every April Fool's Day snapshot, rolled up into one package!
body:
April Fool’s Day is here, so I figured that it would be a good idea to look back at all of the wacky April Fool’s content Minecraft has given to us in the past, along with some brand new content! Ladies and gentlemen, I, EnderPreston, am proud to present…


present tense: refool

verb

/rēˈfo͞ol/

to fool again

“This mod is gonna refool you!”

 

Okay, so it’s kind of a made-up term, but regardless, this mod aims to re-implement almost ALL of the content from every Minecraft April Fool's snapshot!

 

More information on everything that's been added can be found in the Help section of Refooled’s official website! If you don’t know how to craft something, don’t worry. All Refooled recipes are unlocked by default as of version 1.1.0!

 

I hope you all enjoy Refooled, and happy April Fool’s Day!

 

Older versions of this mod can be found on Curseforge.
